dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 15, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates in Slugfest"

The Philadelphia Phillies overcame a late deficit to defeat the Pittsburgh Pirates 11-9, thanks in part to Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance that drove in 5 runs. Bryce Harper also contributed with a strong game, while the Pirates' Oneil Cruz and Bryan Reynolds showed their power with multiple hits. On the mound, José Alvarado earned the win with a scoreless inning, striking out 3.

In other action, the Washington Nationals edged the Baltimore Orioles 3-2 behind Zack Littell's 5 shutout innings, while the Detroit Tigers topped the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 as Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings. The Cincinnati Reds outlasted the Cleveland Guardians 7-6 in a back-and-forth contest, with Matt McLain hitting a home run and driving in 3 runs.
